items.name: ListItem
items.doc: Compact two-line list row with optional subtitle and selected state.

items.name: title
items.doc: Primary text shown for the row.

items.name: subtitle
items.doc: Secondary text shown below the title when non-empty.

items.name: selected
items.doc: Highlights the row as the currently selected item.

items.name: clicked
items.doc: Fired when the row is clicked.
